outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility expected due to massive positive GEX. Market makers will aggressively delta-hedge, enforcing tight mean-reversion ranges.
outlook.summary: With an aggregate 3.46B positive GEX, dealers are heavily long gamma, creating strong magnetic pinning forces. Price is trapped between massive Call Walls at 720-725 and robust Put supports at 710-700. The primary directional bias is a slow gravitational pull toward the 708 Max Pain level. Expect rigid resistance at the top and defended support at the bottom.

levels.motivazione: Epicenter of 0DTE Call volume (over 600k contracts). Positive GEX ensures dealers will actively sell into strength to suppress upward movement here.
Significant Call OI confluence between 0DTE and MONTHLY expirations. Acts as a secondary ceiling capping the current spot price.
MONTHLY Gamma Flip level. Marks the upper boundary of the structural positive gamma zone; exceeding it triggers volatile momentum.
Highly congested 0DTE strike with massive Put (114k Vol) and Call (16k Vol) activity creating erratic chop and localized pinning.
Strong confluence of Put OI in both 0DTE and MONTHLY. Bears have heavily defended this strike, establishing a firm floor.
0DTE Gamma Flip (706.86) aligns perfectly with Max Pain (708.0). Positive GEX creates an extremely strong magnetic attraction downwards.
Institutional grade support with massive Put OI across WEEKLY and MONTHLY. The ultimate structural floor for the series.
